body.title: Theory of Operation: annotate each section with I-intend-that header
body.result: added 8 intention openers to TOO ##-sections (§1–§8), italic format, additive only
body.description:
Annotate each major section of docs/TheoryOfOperation.md with an 'I intend that...' opening statement — making the TOO the first-pass intentions map for the system. This is an additive overlay, not a rewrite: no architecture notes are removed, no section structure changes.

Shape: for each major section (## heading), add one sentence immediately after the heading: 'I intend that [what this section achieves from the user/system perspective].' The intention should be falsifiable — it should be possible to check whether the architecture achieves it.

**Affected files:** docs/TheoryOfOperation.md
**Design rules:** TOO versioning pattern (§3.8 facia pattern from 171e26fe applies — section headers are versioned anchors; don't rename them)
**Scope boundary:** additive annotation only; one 'I intend that...' line per ## section; no deletions; no structural reorg
**Completion criteria:** `grep -c 'I intend that' docs/TheoryOfOperation.md` equals number of ## sections in the file; git diff shows only additions; no existing lines removed
